pages.text: These relics are simpler to understand than the bearer curios. Most are standalone survival or combat tools that do not require reading a whole mechanic tree before they make sense.
When a hit would bring you to $(l)3 hearts or less$(), the triggering hit is softened and you gain brief Resistance. Default cooldown: $(l)60 seconds$().
Gain $(l)50% more XP$() from kills. Straightforward progression relic.
Strips $(l)Blindness$() and $(l)Darkness$() and reveals invisible nearby creatures. It does not brighten the world; it tears away deception.
Burning enemies take $(l)20% more damage$(), and burning targets are easier to track because the censer repeatedly reveals them.
On kill, restore food, a little saturation, and a small amount of health. Good for long PvE runs where sustain matters.
